properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v4

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Here I am, feeling sorry for myself Why did I do it I knew that it was wrong, There you are, telling me that I could be forgiven one more time, For all these years, all I've done, Has caused you sorrow and disgrace.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: But your love's so real Each time I fail you always there To pick me up again You make me feel so special Yes, your love's so real And its the only reason I could stand, The test of time And it's so real to me.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I'ts hard to believed You died for me Seems like a fantasy But in moment like these You made your promises Come alive to me

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Yes, your love's so real Each time I fail you always there To pick me up again You make me feel so special Yes, your love's so real And its the only reason I could stand The test of time And it's so real to me.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Now I know that your grace is all I need, So that I can live a life that pleases you Now you're here Loving inspite of all my inabilities You made it plain that I'm a part of You And You're a part of me

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: But (YES) your love's so real Each time I fail you always there To pick me up again You make me feel so special Yes, your love's so real And its the only reason I could stand The test of time And it's so real to me.
